overall.description: First-person perspective ascending an outdoor elevator through a dense cyberpunk cityscape during a heavy rainstorm at night. The footage transitions from an indoor station through a narrow shaft into open air, revealing towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon billboards characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor elevator station with Night City Arc signage

agents.ego_description: standing at the base of an elevator preparing to ascend, facing the Night City Arc entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with cyan lettering spelling 'Night City Arc' above the elevator entrance
simple wooden seating against the left wall of the station
illuminated white information board with black text and directional arrows
metal elevator door with green frame at the back of the station

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a covered elevator station featuring the 'Night City Arc' signage. The space is artificially lit with concrete flooring and wooden benches, completely sheltered from the weather outside. The camera faces the elevator door before beginning its ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior elevator shaft with heavy rain exposure

events.description: elevator moves from indoor station into exposed outdoor shaft with heavy rain becoming visible

agents.ego_description: rising steadily through the narrow elevator shaft while rain falls heavily around the open cage

entered.detail: rough concrete walls of the elevator shaft passing by closely on both sides
heavy falling rain visible throughout the shaft illuminated by ambient city light
vertical metal maintenance ladder attached to the right shaft wall

segments.scene_description: The elevator enters a narrow concrete shaft exposed to heavy rain. The camera ascends through the falling water with rough concrete walls passing by closely on either side, transitioning from the sheltered station to the open vertical shaft.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-level city ascent with emerging skyline views

events.description: city lights from surrounding skyscrapers become visible as the elevator clears the lower shaft

agents.ego_description: continuing upward through the rain with towering buildings now visible on both sides

entered.detail: tall modern building with illuminated grid-patterned windows rising on the right
dark brutalist concrete building with minimal lighting on the left side
large illuminated advertisement board with white background and red text

segments.scene_description: As the elevator ascends higher, the narrow shaft opens to reveal surrounding skyscrapers. A glass tower with illuminated windows dominates the right side while a concrete tower looms on the left. Heavy rain continues to fall as city lights become more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude panoramic view of dense cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: view opens to panoramic cityscape with numerous neon billboards and dense skyline visible

agents.ego_description: rising through the upper levels of the city with expansive views of the illuminated skyline and neon advertisements

entered.detail: dense cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings stretching into the rainy distance
bright colorful holographic advertisements and signs on nearby building facades
metal maintenance platform or structure visible below the ascending elevator

segments.scene_description: The elevator reaches high altitude, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the dense cyberpunk city. Neon billboards and holographic signs illuminate the rainy night as the camera continues ascending above the lower buildings, with the glass skyscraper now at eye level and the vast cityscape sprawling below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a sheltered transit station into the rainy, neon-lit heights of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. It begins inside a covered elevator station with concrete floors and wooden benches under the Night City Arc signage before moving upward into a narrow, exposed concrete shaft. As the camera rises, the enclosed walls give way to the open air, where heavy rain falls between a looming concrete tower and a glass skyscraper with illuminated windows. The scene then expands into a breathtaking panoramic view as the elevator reaches a high altitude, bringing the glass tower to eye level. Finally, the perspective opens fully to reveal a vast cityscape sprawling below, illuminated by glowing holographic signs and neon billboards piercing through the rainy night.
